Hero.badge: All-in-One SaaS Platform for Algerian Business
Hero.sub: EcoMate is your all-in-one e-commerce partner — AI chatbots, fulfillment, delivery tracking, payments, videos & websites. Built exclusively for Algerian businesses.

Integrations.badge: Connects seamlessly with the platforms your customers already use
Integrations.tools: Keep using the tools you love

Features.sub: EcoMate brings every capability into one seamless, affordable system — powered by real AI, built for real results.

b4.title: Fulfillment
b4.desc: We store it, pack it, and ship it.

How.sub: We handle the complexity so you can focus on growing your business.

s1.title: Tell Us Your Business
s1.desc: Sign up and describe your activity. A quick onboarding call takes under 30 minutes.

s2.title: We Set Everything Up
s2.desc: Our team configures your AI chatbot, catalog, and dashboard.

s3.title: Connect Your Channels
s3.desc: Link your social pages and delivery partner in one click.

s4.title: Launch & Scale
s4.desc: Go live. Your AI handles orders 24/7.

Dashboard.sub: Real-time order tracking, revenue monitoring, and customer insights.

AI.sub: Our AI handles the full customer journey automatically in Arabic, French, and English.

features.title: All Social Platforms
features.desc: Facebook Messenger, Instagram DM, WhatsApp, Telegram.

features.title: Interactive Shopping
features.desc: Customers browse products, pick size and color inside the chat.

features.title: Auto Order Management
features.desc: Every order logged instantly to your dashboard.

features.title: Delivery Auto-Tracking
features.desc: Customers receive live status updates automatically.

Pricing.sub: Select a service to view available packs.

CTA.sub: Join Algerian merchants already automating their sales.
CTA.footer: Built at University of Bouira Startup Incubator · 🇩🇿 Made in Algeria

Footer.desc: The all-in-one SaaS platform helping Algerian SMEs build automated, scalable digital businesses.
